forecast.description: Hot and mostly sunny. Heat index values as high as 102°F. Extreme Heat Warning begins Tuesday.
Dangerously hot and sunny. Heat index up to 109°F. Extreme Heat Warning in effect.
Extremely hot with sunny skies. Heat index up to 109°F. Extreme Heat Warning continues.
Scorching heat continues — high near 99°F, heat index exceeds 105°F. Chance of overnight thunderstorms. Extreme Heat Warning through 8pm.
Still dangerously hot (95°F) with chance of afternoon showers and thunderstorms.
Scorching Independence Day. High 92°F with scattered showers and thunderstorms through afternoon.
Hot (91°F) with chance of morning showers and afternoon thunderstorms. Slight relief from worst heat.

recommendations.reason: Entire week unsafe for outdoor cycling. Mon–Thu under Extreme Heat Warning with heat index 105–109°F. Fri–Sun still 91–95°F with 35–48% storm risk.
Extreme Heat Warning Mon–Thu (heat index 105°F+) makes outdoor running dangerous. Fri–Sun still 91–95°F with storm risk. Use YMCA treadmill all week.
Indoor pool at YMCA (5:30am–9pm weekdays) always available. Outdoor swimming especially welcome during this extreme heat wave.
Strongly recommended all week — Extreme Heat Warning Mon–Thu and continued heat/storms Fri–Sun. YMCA open 5:30am–9pm weekdays, 7am–6pm weekends.
